title: I-800, Petition to Classify Convention Adoptee as an Immediate Relative
description: Petitions to classify a Hague Convention adoptee as an immediate relative.

fields.tooltip: Part 10., Preparer's Statement. Preparer's Signature. 8. Preparer's Date of Signature (month/day/year), enter the date as 2 digit month, 2 digit day and 4 digit year.
fields.notes: Scaffold only. Confirm this field manually before using it for generated filings.

fields.tooltip: Part 9., Interpreter's Certification. I certify, under penalty of perjury, that I am fluent in English and the language which is the same language specified in Parts 7. and 8., Item B. in Item Number 1. Enter the language.
